title: gamal #1580
definition:
1) to deal fully with, recompense
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to deal out to, do to
        1a2) to deal bountifully with
        1a3) to recompense, repay, requite
 2) (Qal) to wean a child
    (Niphal) to be weaned
 3) (Qal) to ripen, bear ripe (almonds)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to deal fully with, recompense
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to deal out to, do to
        1a2) to deal bountifully with
        1a3) to recompense, repay, requite
 2) (Qal) to wean a child
    (Niphal) to be weaned
 3) (Qal) to ripen, bear ripe (almonds)

    NASB:  to deal fully or adequately with, deal out to, wean, ripen
